rationale: All three lenses ran; acceptance lens found every requirement/AC pass (no fail/partial). Triage dismissed 5 concerns as verified-false or documented-intentional (AUTHORIZATION_HEADER has no other refs in persistent.py; mocks match single-arg .get call sites; validate_local_jwt is imported function-scope so the patch target is correct and the pre-existing test proves it; bare-user-id removal is the spec's intentional dev-only breaking change; whitespace dev-id semantics unchanged) and deferred 4 pre-existing/out-of-scope items noted for follow-up (LocalIdp has the same Authorization fallback — follow-up ticket per spec; dev-header path hardening beyond scope; no test for ENV=local with non-local IDP_PROVIDER fallthrough; authenticate_dev_header unhandled IntegrityError for >36-char ids — pre-existing).

business_review.item: Valid local JWT (iss: codemie-local) from POST /v1/local-auth/login is accepted on authenticated endpoints, no 401
business_review.notes: Dev shortcut no longer intercepts Authorization; falls through to IDP_PROVIDER=='local' branch using _extract_local_auth_token + validate_local_jwt; regression test asserts dev auth NOT called and JWT path used

business_review.item: ENV=local dev shortcut no longer treats a Bearer token as a dev user-id (only USER_ID_HEADER honored)
business_review.notes: Authorization fallback removed entirely; AUTHORIZATION_HEADER import dropped; matches Variant A

business_review.item: Dev-header shortcut keeps working for dedicated user-id header in ENV=local
business_review.notes: USER_ID_HEADER branch unchanged; precedence test confirms dev header wins when both present; existing dev-header test still passes

business_review.item: Variant A: remove Authorization-header fallback; AUTHORIZATION_HEADER import removed
business_review.notes: Diff exactly matches spec change block

business_review.item: Behavior matrix: user-id alone → dev auth (unchanged)
Behavior matrix: Bearer JWT alone → validate_local_jwt
Behavior matrix: both present → dev auth wins
Behavior matrix: bare Authorization value → 401 (intentional removal)
business_review.notes: New legacy-removal test; _extract_local_auth_token treats non-Bearer header as absent

business_review.item: Behavior matrix: cookie token only → works (unchanged)
Out of scope: LocalIdp.authenticate fallback left unchanged
Out of scope: authenticate_dev_header semantics unchanged

business_review.notes: Modified block remains inside config.ENV == 'local' guard
All four scenarios covered: regression, dev-shortcut-preserved (existing), precedence, legacy removal; 13 tests pass

standards_review.notes: Single commit 'EPMCDME-13491: Stop treating Authorization header as dev user-id in local env' matches EPMCDME-####: Description format
Ruff format + check pass on both changed files; Apache 2.0 headers intact; no new public functions without types
Change narrows an auth-bypass surface (arbitrary Authorization values no longer mint is_admin=True dev users); no secrets logged; central auth path used
